package alpha

import (
    "fmt"

    "github.com/acme/pkg"
)

// Negative scenario for misgrouped_imports: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Import blocks that place stdlib imports after third-party imports.
func NegativeMisgroupedImports() {
    grouped := []string{pkg.Name}
    fmt.Println(grouped[0])
}
